message.text:
Team, I just finished the usability testing session with Participant 08. Key findings:

1. Navigation confusion on the medication refill flow (3 errors)
2. Positive feedback on the new lab results visualization
3. SUS score: 62.5 (below our target of 70)

I'll upload the full session recording and notes to the shared drive by EOD. @Research Lead can we schedule a debrief for tomorrow?
